summary: A single-shot clip of the Secretary of Labor speaking at a podium during a White House 'American Jobs' event, announcing that DOL has registered over 180,000 new apprentices and nearly 1,800 new apprenticeship programs since January. It is a raw lightly-edited speech excerpt with a static frame, not a music-driven produced piece.
notable_text: Lower-third: 'TEXT "VP" TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE'; banner 'THE WHITE HOUSE' and 'AMERICAN JOBS'.
